message:
fix: address 6 Copilot review comments on CI/CD stat blocks (#8736) (#8744)

1. useCICDStats isDemo detection: use isDemoFallback from cache layer
   instead of fragile heuristic (empty data != demo data)
2. Pass-rate sublabel: use actual matrix.days instead of hardcoded constant
3. Streak prefix: remove dead code (always-empty prefix string)
4. useCICDStats return shape: surface isRefreshing, isDemoData, error,
   lastRefresh, refetch so callers can drive useCardLoadingState
5. PipelineDataProvider repo filter: thread repoFilter from
   PipelineFilterContext via CICDDataBridge component
6. DashboardPage lifecycle props: wire onRefresh, isRefreshing,
   lastUpdated, error, isDemoData from pipeline context

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -352,6 +352,7 @@ export interface UnifiedPipelineData {
   isRefreshing: boolean
   error: string | null
   isFailed: boolean
+  isDemoFallback: boolean
   lastRefresh: number | null
   refetch: () => Promise<void>
 }
